differentials.name: SUPERIOR MEDIASTINAL COMPARTMENT =  thoracic inlet [INFERIOR MEDIASTINAL COMPARTMENT]
Anterior mediastinum = retrosternal region [Anterior boundary:   sternum]
Posterior boundary:   pericardium, aorta, brachiocephalic vessels
differentials.raw: Posterior boundary:   pericardium, aorta, brachiocephalic vessels

differentials.name: Superior boundary:   thoracic inlet [Inferior boundary:   diaphragm]
Middle mediastinum = visceral region [Anterior boundary:   pericardium]
Posterior boundary:   pericardium, posterior tracheal wall
differentials.raw: Posterior boundary:   pericardium, posterior tracheal wall

differentials.name: Superior boundary:   thoracic inlet [Inferior boundary:   diaphragm]
Posterior mediastinum = contains esophagus, descending aorta, paraspinal region
differentials.raw: Posterior mediastinum = contains esophagus, descending aorta, paraspinal region

context: Terminology:   coined by Spigelius "Quod per medium stat" = "what sits in the middle" Contents:   thymus, lymph nodes, adipose tissue, internal mammary vessels Contents:   heart, pericardium, ascending + transverse aorta, SVC, IVC, brachiocephalic vessels, pulmonary vessels, trachea + main bronchi, lymph nodes, phrenic n., vagus n., left recurrent laryngeal n. Anterior boundary:   posterior trachea, pericardium Posterior boundary:   line 1 cm posterior to the anterior edge of vertebral column Superior boundary:   thoracic inlet Inferior boundary:   diaphragm Contents:   esophagus, descending a
